title: Frequently Asked Questions
subtitle: Everything you need to know about CampusFlow.

items.question: What is CampusFlow?
items.answer: CampusFlow is a complete academic productivity platform for CSE and SWE students. It includes assignment cover generation, lab reports, CV builder, CS learning tools, interview preparation, career hub, developer tools, and more.

items.question: Is CampusFlow free?
items.answer: Yes! CampusFlow is completely free for students. No credit card required. All core features including assignment covers, lab reports, CV builder, and learning tools are available at no cost.

items.question: Can I build ATS-friendly resumes?
items.answer: Absolutely. Our CV Builder creates Europass-style, ATS-optimized resumes that pass applicant tracking systems used by top tech companies.

items.question: How does Interview Hub work?
items.answer: Interview Hub imports real interview questions from Bangladesh tech companies. Browse by company, search topics, take quizzes, and bookmark questions for revision.

items.question: Can I export PDF?
items.answer: Yes. Assignment covers, lab reports, and CVs can all be exported as high-quality PDF files with one click.

items.question: Do I need an account?
items.answer: Most tools work without an account. Signing in lets you save your student profile, track progress, and sync data across devices.

items.question: Can I use it on mobile?
items.answer: Yes. CampusFlow is fully responsive and works on phones, tablets, and desktops with touch-friendly controls.

items.question: Is Dark Mode supported?
items.answer: Yes. CampusFlow supports Light, Dark, and System themes with smooth transitions and no flickering.

items.question: Will more tools be added?
items.answer: Yes! We continuously add new learning modules, developer tools, career features, and interview resources. CampusFlow is under active development.

items.question: Can I contribute?
items.answer: We welcome feedback and contributions. Reach out via GitHub or our website bornosoftnr.com to suggest features or report issues.
